subcodes.first_line: This is a day wherein the clamor of the deniers hath been raised on high, and fiery leaves are scattered abroad. Blessed are they who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که نعیق ناعقین مرتفعست و اوراق ناریه منتشر طوبی از برای نفوسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
